editor.rationale: Reviewers support publication but want clarifications on reporting completeness and residual uncertainty.

concerns: Only k=5 of 229 available trials included; heterogeneity and publication-bias diagnostics are underpowered. Justify exclusions or expand eligibility.
RoB 2.0: 0 high-risk + 3 some-concerns domains; add low-RoB sensitivity analysis.
Pooled -1.59 diverges from Frias 2021 benchmark (MD -0.45 [-0.57, -0.32]); Discussion should reconcile explicitly.
Effect not translated into absolute-risk difference / NNT for shared decision.
QoL / PROs not reported by any included trial; add a PRO secondary outcome where source-trial data permits.
